title: はぐれ者のリファレンス

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One day while searching for Air Shakur, I find her taking a rare nap,
her laptop still open.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As I go to close her laptop, the screen catches my eye. It looks like
she had her social media open. The account on-screen says "!monad."

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
From the looks of it, this is an account she uses to post music she
makes. I'm a little surprised by her choice of hobby, but decide to
leave before she wakes up.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: A few days later, I decide to invite Air Shakur to the record shop.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I fully expected her to say no, but it seems she already had plans to
come here. She's allowed me to tag along—but nothing more.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Man, you never learn, huh. Remember what happened at the net
cafe?

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: Once we're at the shop, don't you dare talk to me.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
This artist's not even that big, so why a physical CD? If they'd just
posted it online, I could've bought it with a single click.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: It seems she's come here today to buy the CD of a small-time artist.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: Not really. But it is good for drowning out the thoughts in my head.

text_block_list.name: Young Artist
text_block_list.text: Next up is my newest song, "Rust."

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Air Shakur stops in her tracks. I follow her line of sight to find a young
woman performing on her DJ deck.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: ...Her CD is what I came here to buy.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: Didn't think I'd get to listen to her live today.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With that, Air Shakur finds a spot a bit separated from the artist and
begins to listen to her performance.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The song's rhythm seems to draw you in, and the scat vocals add a
sense of playfulness to the experience. Before I know it, I'm tapping
my foot to the beat.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: ...Yeah, it's not bad.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Most of her stuff online is really light and old school... Looks like she
switched genres to house music.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: Well, change is inevitable after all. Let's get going.

text_block_list.name: Young Artist
text_block_list.text: W-wait! Please take this!

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: Hm?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: The young musician hands a single flyer to Air Shakur.

text_block_list.name: Young Artist
text_block_list.text:
I'm still pretty new to the game, but I'll be performing at this event!
Feel free to drop by if you can!

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
...Got it.
Huh, so it's this weekend—ah!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Taking a peek at the flyer, my eyes settle on the artist's profile, which
explains she was inspired to perform after hearing a certain artist...
!monad.

text_block_list.name: Young Musician
text_block_list.text: Um, 'scuse me... is everything okay?

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: Yeah, it's fine. Good luck this weekend.
choice_data_list: Who's this DJ listed in your profile?
Who's this DJ listed in your profile?

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: Hey!

text_block_list.name: Young Artist
text_block_list.text:
Oh, them! I love, love, LOVE !monad's stuff! I have to be extra careful
to not copy their style completely.

text_block_list.name: Young Artist
text_block_list.text:
I ended up using scat vocals hoping to make the song feel mine... But
well, I'm definitely still working out the kinks in my style!

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
...!monad's music sounds like they're just messing around to me. I
doubt it's got any use as inspiration or whatever.

text_block_list.name: Young Artist
text_block_list.text: Hey, come on, don't say that! I owe !monad my life!

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: ...Your life?

text_block_list.name: Young Artist
text_block_list.text:
I don't mean that literally or anything. It's not like we've ever met.
But...

text_block_list.name: Young Artist
text_block_list.text: I'm just... different from other people, and my life's been pretty hard 'cause of it. But even when I tried to fit in, it's like something was still off, ya know?

text_block_list.name: Young Artist
text_block_list.text:
But that's when I heard !monad's music, and it felt like someone was
sticking the middle finger to the world! It gave me the push I needed
to do things my way!

text_block_list.name: Young Artist
text_block_list.text:
But all that aside, their musical sense alone is on another level!
They're like a bat out of hell, screaming bloody murder! They're truly
living in the moment!

text_block_list.name: Young Artist
text_block_list.text: I'd love to meet them myself one day. I just know that deep down, they've got a heart burning with passion!

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: ...Is that so?

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: ...Huh? What're you smiling about?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Several days later...

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text:
Hey, look at this! Someone put a super flashy flyer on the bulletin
board! You think a student did it?

text_block_list.name: Umamusume B
text_block_list.text:
Probably. But wait, isn't this for a club in town? Huh... Maybe I'll
check it out.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
A mysterious flyer posted on the school bulletin board quickly
becomes the talk of the academy.
